title: 12. Webcam and Heart Rate
description: How presence-style sensory sources should be used carefully, with clear consent and conservative behavior rules.

steps.title: Presence Sources
steps.body: Webcam and Heart Rate are more personal than screen or clipboard. Enable them only when the user wants this kind of awareness.

steps.title: Webcam Context
steps.body: Webcam is useful for posture, gaze, expression, visible props, and presence cues. Good rules react to clear signals rather than guessing too much.

steps.title: Heart Rate Context
steps.body: Heart Rate reacts to BPM states instead of images. It is best for coaching, concern, workout callouts, or persona reactions to measurable thresholds.

steps.title: Avoid Overreach
steps.body: Presence sources should be conservative. Prefer simple observations and opt-in behavior over confident claims about mood, health, or intent.
